title: Xtra Chewy Italian Muffins
description: A quick-fix Italian dish featuring chewy muffins marinated in a peppery sauce, cooked in a tandoor clay pot and suitable for diabetics.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the olive oil and marinara sauce to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Place the balls into the preheated tandoor clay pot and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the muffins from the pot and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the grated parmesan cheese and chopped parsley over the muffins and serve.
Serve the muffins warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
